= Principal =
    * bspwm - instalando bspwm e sxhkd vindo junto 
    * .config - configuracao dos diversos programs 
        * Zathura 
        * sxiv
        * alacritty
        * polybar
        * Rofi + Rofi calculator
        * Scripts
        * neovim
        * lf
        * zsh + env + zshrc
        * Discord
        * spotify
        * fcitx + Mozc
        * gnupg + pass
        * calcurse
        * Go 
        * dunst
        * Brave 
        * Lutris 
        * Steam 
        * Newsboat
        * Neofetch 
        * Yay 
        * youtube-dl
